titleStmt.title: SII 9.553: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 553. (A.R. No. 51 of 1904.) ON THE PEDASTAL OF THE NANDI NEAR THE SHRINE OF VIRABHADRA AT KUDATANI, BELLARY TALUK, BELLARY DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Ňöaka 1454, Nandana, Adhika-BhńĀdrapada, ba. 30, Ňöu[kravńĀra], corresponding to A.D. 1532 August 30, Friday. It refers itself to the reign of Achyutadńďva-MahńĀrńĀya and records that KoŠĻáŠłćapa, brother-in-law of BhaŠĻáŠłćńĀrada Timmapa-Ayya, made a gift of land, together with some toll revenue, for offerings to the god Vńęrabhadra at KuŠłćutaŠĻái. The gift is stated to have been made for the merit of Timmapa-Ayya.

encodingDesc.p: Encoded in TEI/EpiDoc according to the DHARMA Encoding Guide for Documentary Editions, version 2

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
